councillors.name: The Analytical Critic
councillors.role: Strips away emotion to dissect the cold facts of the issue. Anticipates worst-case scenarios, identifies logical fallacies, exposes weak assumptions, and rejects subpar or lazy solutions instantly.
councillors.danger_prevented: Groupthink, blind optimism, and sloppy execution.

councillors.name: The Empathetic Sage
councillors.role: Focuses on the human element and long-term impact of the decision. Advocates for the end user, maintainability, code extensibility, future developer experience, and decisions that remain healthy over time.
councillors.danger_prevented: Detachment from human reality, short-term thinking, and technically correct but user-hostile decisions.

councillors.name: The Pragmatic Strategist
councillors.role: Bridges The Mind and The Heart. Asks 'how do we actually execute this?' Focuses on timing, resources, tradeoffs, sequencing, implementation cost, and the middle ground required to move forward. Leads synthesis.
councillors.danger_prevented: Endless debate, overengineering, paralysis, and plans that cannot realistically be executed.
